title: Quarterly Investment Report – December 31, 2025
resolved_text:
Memorandum


DATE: February 24, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Matt Taylor, Assistant Finance Director
DEPT: Finance
SUBJECT: Quarterly Investment Report – December 31, 2025
Attached is the quarterly financial report for October 1, 2025 through December 31, 2025. The quarterly financial report will be shared on reno.gov for Reno constituents to review and be updated on the status of revenues and expenses.

Disclaimer
Disclaimer
The views expressed within this material constitute the perspective and judgment of U.S. Bancorp Asset Management, Inc. at the time of distribution and are subject to change. Any forecast, projection, or prediction of the market, the economy, economic trends, and equity or fixed-income markets are based upon current opinion as of the date of issue and are also subject to change. Opinions and data presented are not necessarily indicative of future events or expected performance. Information contained herein is based on data obtained from recognized statistical services, issuer reports or communications, or other sources, believed to be reliable. No representation is made as to the accuracy or completeness of the information contained herein.
PFM Asset Management serves clients in the public sector and is a division of U.S. Bancorp Asset Management, Inc., which is the legal entity providing investment advisory services. U.S. Bancorp Asset Management, Inc. is a registered investment adviser, a direct subsidiary of U.S. Bank N.A. and an indirect subsidiary of U.S. Bancorp. U.S. Bank N.A. is not responsible for and does not guarantee the products, services, or performance of U.S. Bancorp Asset Management, Inc.

fields.tldr: The City of Reno Finance Department presents its quarterly investment report for the period October 1 through December 31, 2025, managed by PFM Asset Management (a division of U.S. Bancorp Asset Management). The total managed portfolio stood at approximately $408.1 million as of December 31, 2025, with a core separately managed account market value of roughly $378.9 million. The report includes an economic update covering labor market conditions, inflation trends, and Federal Reserve rate-cut expectations for 2026. The report will be published on reno.gov for public review.
fields.key_stats: Total PFMAM Managed Account: $408,126,893; Core Portfolio Market Value: $378,893,119; Amortized Cost: $374,509,083; Accrued Interest: $2,509,372; Cash: $944,659; Weighted Average Maturity: 1,139 days; Sector allocation: U.S. Treasury 52%, Corporate 18%, ABS 13%, Agency CMBS 12%, Agency MBS Pass Through 1%, Negotiable CD 1%, Agency CMO 1%, Commercial Paper <1%; January 2026 unemployment rate: 4.3%; CPI year-over-year: 2.4%; Core CPI year-over-year: 2.5%; 2025 monthly average nonfarm payroll change: 15k; Market-implied Fed rate cuts in 2026: ~2.5 cuts of 25 basis points; Dec 2026 implied rate: 3.01%; Dec 2027 implied rate: 2.94%
fields.action_items: Quarterly investment report to be shared on reno.gov for public review.

dates: January 2026 (labor market and CPI data reference)
February 13, 2026 (U.S. Treasury yield curve data date)
people: Annette Gaston, Director (PFM Asset Management / City of Reno contact)
